leadText: The Comet Shard (Japanese: すいせいのかけら Comet Shard) is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Comet Shard serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Giant Chasm Held by wild Clefairy , wild Lunatone , and wild Solrock (1% chance each, dark grass only) B2 W2 Join Avenue ( Avenue rank reward) Dragonspiral Tower Held by wild Clefairy , wild Lunatone , and wild Solrock (1% chance each, dark grass only) DW * Rugged Mountain X Y Anistar City Battle Chateau OR AS Route 114 , Lilycove City Secret Base ("Search for treasure" with Secret Pal ) Any Contest Spectacular Hall (random gift from a fan after completing a Master Rank Contest) S M US UM Hokulani Observatory , Haina Desert , Route 15 US UM , Poni Beach US UM , Poni Coast S M Smashing breakable rocks with Tauros Charge ( Vast Poni Canyon , Poni Plains , Resolution Cave , Poni Coast ) Poké Pelago (Isle Aphun - Odd-Shard Hunting, Rare-Treasure Hunting, Interesting-Item Hunting) Sw Sh Route 10 Hidden recurring item ( Stony Wilderness , Giant's Cap , Dusty Bowl , Giant's Mirror ) Max Raid Battles ( East Lake Axewell , Giant's Seat , North Lake Miloch , Motostoke Riverbank , Stony Wilderness , Dusty Bowl , Hammerlocke Hills , Giant's Cap ) Bridge Field ( Digging Duo ) Sw Sh IA Hidden recurring item ( Brawlers' Cave , Courageous Cavern , Potbottom Desert ) Max Raid Battles ( Soothing Wetlands , Forest of Focus , Brawlers' Cave , Courageous Cavern , Training Lowlands , Workout Sea , Stepping-Stone Sea ) Cram-o-matic ( Flying , Ground , Bug , Ghost , Grass , or Ice : 112-120 points) Cram-o-matic ( Star Pieces in Slots #1, #3, and #4) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Slippery Slope , Tunnel to the Top ) Max Raid Battles ( Slippery Slope , Giant's Bed , Snowslide Slope , Path to the Peak , Frigid Sea , Ballimere Lake ) LA Galaxy Hall (×3; sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A shard which fell to the ground when a comet approached. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP A shard that fell to the ground when a comet approached. It can be sold at a high price to shops. LA A shard that fell to the ground when a comet passed nearby. It can be sold at a high price at the general store. S V A shard that fell to the ground when a comet passed nearby. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution 1.4.1.1 As a held item In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 N/A N/A * X Y OR AS LA N/A $ 15,000 S M US UM N/A $ 30,000 Sw Sh S V N/A $ 12,500 In the Generation V games, the Comet Shard can be sold to the ore maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 60000. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Comet Shard can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 30,000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Comet Shard serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A shard which fell to the ground when a comet approached. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP A shard that fell to the ground when a comet approached. It can be sold at a high price to shops. LA A shard that fell to the ground when a comet passed nearby. It can be sold at a high price at the general store. S V A shard that fell to the ground when a comet passed nearby. It can be sold at a high price to shops.
